heading: Prohibition on direct offering of commercial telecommunications service directly to consumers
label: 1432 Prohibition on direct offering of commercial telecommunications service directly to consumers

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The First Responder Network Authority shall not offer, provide, or market commercial telecommunications or information services directly to consumers.

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: b Rule of construction
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to prohibit the First Responder Network Authority and a secondary user from entering into a covered leasing agreement pursuant to . Nothing in this section shall be construed to limit the First Responder Network Authority from collecting lease fees related to network equipment and infrastructure pursuant to .section 1428(a)(2)(B) of this titlesection 1428(a)(3) of this title
